steps: "File dividend tax refund claim with Dutch Belastingdienst using IB 92 form for EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding",
"Submit supporting documentation: custodian statement, Norwegian tax residency certificate, and NL-NO treaty rate confirmation (15%)",
"Contact ABN AMRO Custody to verify if they can process treaty relief at source for future Unilever NV distributions",
"Follow up on refund status within 8 weeks of submission per Dutch tax authority timelines"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
